Terms of Service

Last updated: June 28, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using NeuroPlay, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website.

2. Description of Service

NeuroPlay provides free online brain training games and cognitive tests. All games are provided "as is" and for entertainment and educational purposes only. Game scores and results should not be used for medical diagnosis or clinical assessment.

3. User Conduct

You agree not to:

  • Use the website in any way that violates applicable laws or regulations
  • Attempt to interfere with the proper functioning of the website
  • Use automated scripts or bots to interact with the website
  • Reverse engineer or attempt to extract the source code of our games

4. Intellectual Property

All content, games, graphics, and code on NeuroPlay are the intellectual property of NeuroPlay unless otherwise stated. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our express permission.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties

NeuroPlay is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the availability, accuracy, or reliability of our services.

6. Limitation of Liability

NeuroPlay shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising out of or in connection with the use of our website.

7. Contact

For questions about these Terms, please contact us atmiraclehuang611@gmail.com.

🧠NeuroPlay

Train Your Brain, Unleash Your Potential

Free online brain training games to test and improve your cognitive abilities. Measure your typing speed, reaction time, memory, and more.

  • Typing Test
  • Reaction Test
  • Memory Test
  • Number Memory
